name: Sour Cream Candy
recipeInstructions:
1. Stir the sour cream and sugar together in a 2-quart heavy saucepan.
2. Bring to a boil, stirring constantly, and cook to the soft boil stage (238°F).
3. Remove from heat; add butter and cool without stirring or moving until the pan feels lukewarm to the hand (110°F).
4. Stir in vanilla and pecans.
5. Beat until the candy loses its gloss.
6. Pour into a buttered 8 1/2 x 4 1/2 x 2 1/2 inch loaf pan.
7. Chill.
8. Cut into 21 pieces.
Makes 3/4 pound. (Sour cream contributes its flavor to this rich and creamy sweet. Enjoy!)
